records.m_Talk_ENG: Lieutenant General, I've seen that form in the Administration database.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lieutenant General, I've seen that form in the Administration database.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lieutenant General, I've seen that form in the Administration database.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right. Looks like Demon-type and Undead-type C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right. Looks like Demon-type and Undead-type C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right. Looks like Demon-type and Undead-type C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never thought... Category 3 and Category 4 C.O.s would swarm in numbers like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never thought... Category 3 and Category 4 C.O.s would swarm in numbers like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never thought... Category 3 and Category 4 C.O.s would swarm in numbers like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You dare liken the failures who sullied the queen's march to us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You dare liken the failures who sullied the queen's march to us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You dare liken the failures who sullied the queen's march to us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's the insolent babble of base vermin, it is blasphemy all the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's the insolent babble of base vermin, it is blasphemy all the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's the insolent babble of base vermin, it is blasphemy all the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You heard that, Lin Xien? Those are Category 3 and Category 4 C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You heard that, Lin Xien? Those are Category 3 and Category 4 C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You heard that, Lin Xien? Those are Category 3 and Category 4 C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What can we even do now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What can we even do now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What can we even do now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehehe. In a struggle where blood washes blood, a gun knows but one way, my friend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehehe. In a struggle where blood washes blood, a gun knows but one way, my friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehehe. In a struggle where blood washes blood, a gun knows but one way, my friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only... I'm not in top shape today. A g-good duel would be hard to promise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only... I'm not in top shape today. A g-good duel would be hard to promise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only... I'm not in top shape today. A g-good duel would be hard to promise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Per the brief, Apostles can't exert their full power in the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Per the brief, Apostles can't exert their full power in the Normalside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Per the brief, Apostles can't exert their full power in the Normalside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With that in mind... they're not as big a threat as you think.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With that in mind... they're not as big a threat as you think.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With that in mind... they're not as big a threat as you think.

records.m_Talk_ENG: True, I brandished the authority to condemn the witch's Shadows earlier.
records.m_Talk_DEU: True, I brandished the authority to condemn the witch's Shadows earlier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: True, I brandished the authority to condemn the witch's Shadows earlier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I cannot deny the sisters here lost the name our queen bestowed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I cannot deny the sisters here lost the name our queen bestowed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I cannot deny the sisters here lost the name our queen bestowed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet now that the profane device has fallen silent and the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots reclaim their might...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet now that the profane device has fallen silent and the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots reclaim their might...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet now that the profane device has fallen silent and the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots reclaim their might...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How could I call the ground beneath your feet anything but your grave plot?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How could I call the ground beneath your feet anything but your grave plot?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How could I call the ground beneath your feet anything but your grave plot?

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-something just flashed and moved...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-something just flashed and moved...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-something just flashed and moved...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Minseo, are you okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Minseo, are you okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Minseo, are you okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm fine, but Major got hurt protecting me...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm fine, but Major got hurt protecting me...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm fine, but Major got hurt protecting me...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm all right too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I'm all right too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I'm all right too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A scratch like this... I'll recover quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A scratch like this... I'll recover quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A scratch like this... I'll recover quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Lieutenant General, I think
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Lieutenant General, I think
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Lieutenant General, I think
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. If it slipped past you entirely even when you were watching for an opening, our intel's off.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. If it slipped past you entirely even when you were watching for an opening, our intel's off.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. If it slipped past you entirely even when you were watching for an opening, our intel's off.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With numbers like that... Holding here to block them completely is impossible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With numbers like that... Holding here to block them completely is impossible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With numbers like that... Holding here to block them completely is impossible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll handle the Apostles. Free Riders, sweep for any remaining civilians and evacuate them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll handle the Apostles. Free Riders, sweep for any remaining civilians and evacuate them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll handle the Apostles. Free Riders, sweep for any remaining civilians and evacuate them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-yes, ma'am! Orders received!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-yes, ma'am! Orders received!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-yes, ma'am! Orders received!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A pity. Were I in peak form, those curs and I would have had a fine match.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A pity. Were I in peak form, those curs and I would have had a fine match.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A pity. Were I in peak form, those curs and I would have had a fine match.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quit babbling and go...! We'll only get in the way if we stay...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quit babbling and go...! We'll only get in the way if we stay...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quit babbling and go...! We'll only get in the way if we stay...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll say this now, Jaina. I won't force the young to stake their lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll say this now, Jaina. I won't force the young to stake their lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll say this now, Jaina. I won't force the young to stake their lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I respect your soldiers' spirit, but that doesn't mean I want a soldier's death for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I respect your soldiers' spirit, but that doesn't mean I want a soldier's death for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I respect your soldiers' spirit, but that doesn't mean I want a soldier's death for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From the moment you saw me as Jaina Kropel and not Replacer Queen...
records.m_Talk_DEU: From the moment you saw me as Jaina Kropel and not Replacer Queen...
records.m_Talk_FRA: From the moment you saw me as Jaina Kropel and not Replacer Queen...

records.m_Talk_DEU: I chose to stand beside you as a comrade, not as a soldier.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I chose to stand beside you as a comrade, not as a soldier.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this isn't about your orders.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this isn't about your orders.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this isn't about your orders.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By my own will, I'll stay and fight with you, Lieutenant General.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By my own will, I'll stay and fight with you, Lieutenant General.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By my own will, I'll stay and fight with you, Lieutenant General.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Truly, I'm blessed with juniors I don't deserve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Truly, I'm blessed with juniors I don't deserve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Truly, I'm blessed with juniors I don't deserve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I must answer that resolve in kind.
